titleStmt.title: SII 17.648: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 648. (A.R. No. 598 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Kuraṅganātha temple.
This inscription contains only a portion of the praśasti Tirumaṉṉivaḷara of Rājēndra I.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭan=tayum poṟceyappāvayum cirttaniccel viyuṅ tanperunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟaneṭutuyaruḻiyiluṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷk koḷḷippākkamum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṉaikkaṭak kamum porukaṭaliḻattarayartamuṭiyum Āṅkavan teviyar roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉa var pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=tiramuṭiyum In=tiranāramum teṇṭirai yiḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimayilc cūṭum kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ce
ruviṟ cinavilirupattorukālaracukaḷai keṭṭa paracurāman mevaruñcān=timattīvaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaṉ naḷapperum pukaḻḻoṭu piṭiya Ilaṭṭāpāṭi Eḻḻārai Ilakkamum navaṉnati kulaperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirar cakkara koṭṭamum muturai paṭavallaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.648 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
